violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for Potatoes. Per interview of the PIC, Potatoes were placed in covered plastic containers in the walk-in cooler prior to inspection and observed 55 degrees. Potatoes were uncovered for rapid cooling at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The deli slicer had food debris 2) The ice machine had biofilm New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024

The dish machine is lacking a proper air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
